services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: End-to-end finance and real estate services

debt.detail: We help you consolidate debt and restructure your finances with a clear plan. Our team coordinates with trusted financial institutions so you can get approved and manage repayments systematically—with options to move into a new home once your debt is resolved.

rentBuy.detail: Rent-to-own for houses, condos, land, and commercial properties in locations that suit living and investment. We help you find the right property, assess pricing, and handle paperwork from start to finish so you can become an owner more easily.

consign.detail: Consign your property for sale or rent with an experienced team. Fill in property details and choose listing type (sale/rent). Submissions go to Admin → Consignments for evaluation, photography, and listing.

loans.title: Loan / Debt Consolidation Inquiry
loans.subtitle: Fill in your details and we will get back to you
loans.adminNote: Submissions go to Admin → Loan applications (source: website)

consign.title: Consign for Sale / Rent
consign.subtitle: Submit property details and choose listing type (sale or rent) for our team to evaluate and list
consign.adminNote: Submissions go to Admin → Consignments (pending approval) based on the listing type selected

rent.title: Rentals
rent.subtitle: Browse rental listings and submit a rental request
rent.adminNote: Submissions go to Admin → Rental requests

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: WP Property — full-service finance and real estate experts
about.lead: WP Property — full-service finance and real estate experts
about.intro:
WP Property (WP Property Wealthy Millionaire Co., Ltd.) is a finance and real estate specialist offering end-to-end services: loans, debt consolidation, home refinancing, property consignment, buying and selling, and rental property management — with over 19 years of experience.

We understand that financial and property management challenges matter. WP Property focuses on clear, transparent advice tailored to each client's goals — whether reducing debt, improving cash flow, or generating income from real estate.

debtConsolidation.title: Why consolidate debt with a home loan through WP Property?
debtConsolidation.intro: If you carry multiple debts — credit cards, personal loans, or other finance — consolidating with a home loan may help reduce your monthly burden.
debtConsolidation.helpsLead: WP Property advises on home-loan debt consolidation to help clients
points: Structure loans to fit your income
debtConsolidation.outro: Our team analyses each case in detail, from initial assessment and document preparation through to coordinating with lenders, so you get the most suitable options.

consignSale.title: Why consign your home, condo, or property with WP Property?
consignSale.intro: WP Property offers full consignment services with marketing and sales teams that help close deals faster.
consignSale.outro: We focus on reaching the right buyers and reducing the hassle of doing it yourself.

rentalManagement.title: Full rental management in one place
rentalManagement.intro: For owners who want to rent out but lack time to manage, WP Property handles tenant sourcing, contracts, rent collection, and coordination.
points: Owners who cannot manage tenants themselves
rentalManagement.outro: We manage professionally so your asset generates income efficiently with fewer day-to-day hassles.

whyChooseUs.title: Why do many clients choose WP Property?
whyChooseUs.intro: Over 19 years of experience in real estate and finance
points: Full support for loans, buying/selling, and rentals
whyChooseUs.outro: WP Property is ready to be your partner in finance and real estate — making home, investment, and debt management simpler and more effective.

legal.privacyBody: We only use information you submit through forms to contact you and provide services. We do not share it with third parties without consent.
